message:
Update to 4x scaling - rendering works but GIF encoder broken

- Rendering is correct (verified with PGM output)
- PGM shows readable 'Hello' text
- But GIF output is garbled (LZW encoder bug)
- Need to fix LZW encoder or switch to PNG

Issue: writeLZWCode bit packing corrupts pixel data
Next: Fix GIF encoder or use PNG library instead
